tasks.notes: Superseded by arch-guardrails-enforce-3-layers and its dependent tasks.

search/modes.rs truncate_content uses raw byte slice; panics on multi-byte UTF-8. Use runie_core::tool::format::truncate_output. Only correctness-bug finding. Index status reverted from done to todo: file header says todo, code still contains the target artifact.

Delete bin/, ui/, scripts/watch-dspec.sh, .hermes/, strip bacon.toml, remove EOF/run/fix_into.py/refactor_events.py/__pycache__. ~190 tracked files from removed parity/dspec workflow. Index status reverted from done to todo: file header says todo, code still contains the target artifact.

tool/runtime.rs (183 LOC) duplicate ToolRuntime trait, zero external importers. Live one is tool_runtime.rs. Index status reverted from done to todo: file header says todo, code still contains the target artifact.

runie-agent/src/inspector.rs (315 LOC) unused; LatencyTracker impl is empty (always returns ZERO). Index status reverted from done to todo: file header says todo, code still contains the target artifact.

harness_skills/ (885 LOC) never instantiated in prod; run_agent_turn hardcodes None. Wire or delete. Index status reverted from done to todo: file header says todo, code still contains the target artifact.
mcp.rs (482 LOC) mostly stub; call_tool returns not-implemented, JsonRpc/next_id dead_code. Gate behind feature or implement.

crates/_archive/harness/ (874 LOC) zero refs, no Cargo member. clean-archive task re-accumulated. Index status reverted from done to todo: file header says todo, code still contains the target artifact.

fresh_state() duplicated ~38x across test files; shared versions exist but unused. AMENDED: now covers all shared test helpers (fresh_state, type_str, exec, tmp_store, minimal_session, write_skill, ENV_LOCK). Tests are 63% of core LOC — single biggest dedup win.
print/json/server mains repeat headless setup boilerplate 3x. Extend runie-core::headless_runtime.
config_reload/ 2-file re-export shim + 3 dead type aliases. 4 callers to rewrite. Index status reverted from done to todo: file header says todo, code still contains the target artifact.
TruncationSection (core) == TruncationConfig (agent) same fields/defaults + bridge fn. Single source of truth.
runie-tui/src/diff.rs (466 LOC) parallel DiffLineType/ParsedDiff mirroring runie_core::diff. Render directly.
fallback_providers, permissions.mode parsed-then-discarded; 5 subagent tool names recognized but unimplemented.
runie-agent/src/path_utils.rs 3-line re-export, zero users. Index status reverted from done to todo: file header says todo, code still contains the target artifact.
allow_all_gate/mock_provider duplicated 3x each; promote into runie-testing.
SessionActor unit-msg subscriber, NotificationExt single-impl trait, resolve_path 1-line forwarder.
Archive 27 done task files, fix Architecture.md dead refs, clean .gitignore, sync verify-tests.sh count.

5-line pub use runie_core::ipc::TuiIpc shim with zero callers. Same class as delete-path-utils-reexport and delete-config-reload-shim; missed in prior audit. Index status reverted from done to todo: file header says todo, code still contains the target artifact.

Convert 6 foo.rs + foo/ dual-path pairs to foo/mod.rs style: tool_markers, tool_parser, provider_registry, model_catalog, login_config, message. ~3,036 LOC, mechanical git mv. Index status reverted from done to todo: file header says todo, code still contains the target artifact.
Move 6 session_*.rs files (1,863 LOC) at runie-core src root into session/ dir. Drops root file count 60 -> 54. Touches runie-testing and arch_guardrails path strings.
8-line runie-tui/src/core_ui/mod.rs re-export of runie_core::ui types. Either inline 8 callers to use runie_core::ui directly or document a concrete orphan-rule blocker.

Move 7 *_tests.rs loose files into module tests/ subdirs or inline. #[path] workarounds (tool_parser_tests, form_tests) drop after dual-path consolidation. event/variants_tests owned by simplify-event-module-layout.
update/login_flow/ is a single-file directory containing only tests.rs. Collapses after dual-path consolidation converts login_flow.rs -> login_flow/mod.rs.
Consolidate provider.rs + provider_registry.rs + provider_registry/data.rs + providers_dialog.rs into single provider/ dir. Supersedes provider_registry portion of consolidate-dual-path-modules.

Move update/login_flow.rs handlers into login_flow/handlers.rs. Absorbs flatten-update-login-flow-tests-dir. AMENDED: also reduce state.clone()/flow.clone() sites (5x) by extracting fields before mutable borrows.
Merge state/ (AgentState, CommandUsage, InputState, SessionState, ViewState) into model/state/. One state namespace.
Replace ~100 per-handler mark_dirty() calls with single dirty flag checked at dispatcher. Biggest boilerplate reduction.
Add AppState::active_provider() and AppState::warn() helpers to dedupe login_flow/system handler boilerplate.

Replace ~20 _ => {} arms with explicit comments or exhaustive variant lists. Readability/correctness task. Index status reverted from done to todo: file header says todo, code still contains the target artifact.
Rename update/dialog/panel.rs -> panel_handler.rs to disambiguate from dialog/panel.rs. Index status reverted from done to todo: file header says todo, code still contains the target artifact.
Split 4 files at/near 500-line limit: update/input/text.rs, model/state/app_state.rs, dialog/panel.rs, config.rs. Round 2 of split-large-files.

Resolve 18 #[allow(...)] markers: delete 8 dead_code allows, refactor or document 6 too_many_arguments, keep 4 niche-lint allows with comment. 80/20 of dead code shipping in prod. Index status reverted from done to todo: file header says todo, code still contains the target artifact.

680 .to_string() vs 2 .to_owned(). Remove String.to_string() redundant clones, convert &str.to_string() to .into()/.to_owned(). Mechanical. Index status reverted from done to todo: file header says todo, code still contains the target artifact.
Merge toggle-family (toggle+provider_model_toggle+model_selector -> toggles.rs) and file-picker-family (fff+file_picker -> file_pickers.rs). 11 files -> 9. update/dialog is 29% of update/.
Fold 4 thin test slivers (multiple 32, edge_cases 34, model_select 47, core 49) into parents. 14 files -> 10. tests/login_logout is 12% of core tests.
Classify 19 take()/mem::take sites. Extract with_dialog helper for the 9-site open_dialog cluster. Comment legitimate parser-buffer flushes.

Finding #1: runie-core (33k LOC) still has sync IO in model/mod.rs (git), auth.rs, session_store.rs. Move behind existing GitService/ConfigStore/SessionStore actor traits; empty the arch_guardrails legacy allow-list. Prerequisite to delete-async-io-bridge.

Finding #2: PersistenceActor + SessionStoreActor + SessionActor (687 LOC) all touch SessionStore/SessionIndex, duplicate SessionMetadata. Unify into one actors/session/ actor. ~400 LOC removed, 2 spawns dropped from TUI bootstrap.

Finding #4: 5 #[cfg(test)] branches in app_state.rs fall back to login_config:: for config reads/writes. Replace with injected ConfigStore mocks (trait already exists). Deletes login_config.rs (141 LOC) + ~15 test set_test_config_* call sites. Originally listed consolidate-dual-path-modules under blocks; corrected to depends_on since this task deletes the file consolidate-dual-path-modules would otherwise migrate.

Finding #5 (uncovered): settings.rs + providers_dialog.rs + update/settings_dialog.rs + update/dialog/provider_model_toggle.rs split across 3 dirs. Consolidate into settings/ dir. Login-flow portion owned by consolidate-login-flow-handlers; config-reload portion by delete-config-reload-shim.

Finding #7: runie-core/src/ui/ (1041 LOC) is the view-model (Element/Feed/Transform), not UI. Actual rendering is runie-tui/src/ui/. Two ui/ dirs with different meanings is confusing. Rename core ui/ -> view/.

Finding #10: runie-protocol (557 LOC) has 2 consumers (runie-server + runie-core/src/ipc.rs). YAGNI separate crate. Fold into runie-core/src/proto/ (ipc.rs moves to proto/ipc.rs). Reversible if external IDE consumer appears.

Finding #11: async_io.rs run_blocking_if_runtime/block_in_place_if_runtime are documented tactical bridge for sync IO. Once finish-io-migration lands, zero callers. Delete the module; do not keep dead bridge code.
Finding #13: Actor::run_body default is a no-op (every actor overrides it); spawn_actor generic helper is dead production code (every actor uses own spawn). Drop the default; pick one spawn pattern.
Finding #14: runie-testing (344 LOC) has 1 external consumer (runie-agent/src/tests/tool_runtime.rs). Fold into runie-agent tests as #[cfg(test)] modules. Cancel if a second consumer is planned.

Master index of 31 findings from the YAGNI/stdlib/OS-features audit. Maps each finding (F1-F31) to an existing task or a new task created by this audit. Tiers 1-7 group by nature; within tier, ordered by recommended execution.

Finding F7: tool_parser_tests.rs (106 LOC) is a stray top-level file; convention is foo/tests.rs. Run after consolidate-dual-path-modules. Index status reverted from done to todo: file header says todo, code still contains the target artifact.
Finding F8: runie-tui/src/ipc.rs is a 5-line re-export of runie_core::ipc::TuiIpc. Inline callers; delete the shim. Same pattern as inline-or-document-core-ui-shim.
Finding F9: format_fff_git_status (update/dialog/fff.rs:85) and format_git_status_str (actors/fff_indexer/search.rs:127) are the same STATUS_LABELS table + loop. Unify after git2 is replaced.

Finding F10: after the dead rich trait is deleted, tool::Tool + tool_runtime::ToolRuntime + EngineToolRuntime adapter remain. One trait is enough if tests use Tool fakes. Supersedes the 'kept both' outcome of done pure-snapshot-and-tool-runtime-trait.

Finding F12: redb adopted in done adopt-redb-session-store. Reversal proposal: append-only JSONL log + atomic-rename index is stdlib-sufficient. Either revert with one-time .redb -> .jsonl migration, or document a concrete workload needing redb.
Finding F13: notify + notify-debouncer-mini adopted in done adopt-notify-config-watcher. Single consumer (ConfigActor). 1s stat-poll is stdlib + tokio, no platform-specific failure modes.

Findings F14+F15+F18+F20 bundled: parking_lot (3 sites) -> std Mutex; chrono (1 site) -> stdlib HH:MM; nucleo-matcher (1 site) -> subsequence scorer; glob (2 sites) -> read_dir recursion. Run after drop-event-bus-replay-buffer so parking_lot loses its bus.rs site.

Finding F16: arboard + png adopted in done adopt-arboard-clipboard. Single consumer (clipboard_image.rs). Either feature-gate behind clipboard-image, drop, or document usage. Third option: shell out via IoActor for image bytes (OS tools).

Finding F17: schemars + jsonschema adopted in done adopt-layered-config. Schema generation belongs in dev/example; runtime validation of small known-shape TOML can be hand-written. Move schemars to dev-deps, drop jsonschema, or feature-gate.

Finding F19: tiktoken-rs adopted in done adopt-tiktoken-rs. Heuristic estimate_tokens path already exists; provider usage field is authoritative for billing. Most accuracy-sensitive drop in the audit.

Findings F21+F22: runie-agent Cargo.toml has duplicate runie-provider + tokio lines; runie-server has duplicate tokio line. Cargo unions features silently; last declaration drops features. Zero-risk merge to feature union. Index status reverted from done to todo: file header says todo, code still contains the target artifact.

Finding F26: EventBus wraps tokio::broadcast AND adds own ReplayBuffer (parking_lot Mutex<VecDeque>). SessionActor disk-replay already covers startup. Drop in-memory replay; bus.rs becomes thin broadcast wrapper; unblocks parking_lot removal.

Finding F29: AppState has 5 Option<Sender> actor handles + #[cfg(test)] direct-call branches in 5 accessors (configured_providers, resolve_default_model, provider_config, remove_provider, set_provider_models). Either always spawn actors in tests, or route reads through config_cache only. Coordinate with remove-login-config-test-shim.

Finding F30: effect_payload.rs (98 LOC, core) computes EffectPayload from Event+State; tui/effects/mod.rs maps EffectPayload -> EffectCommand. Two-step mapping with one consumer. Weigh against IO|Domain|UI posture (pure extraction may belong in domain).

Finding F31: event/aliases.rs has 4 type aliases (CommandEvent, ModelConfigEvent -> ControlEvent; LoginFlowEvent -> DialogEvent; EditEvent -> IoEvent) used in ~5 update files. Hide enum identity. Drop and rename call sites, or document a real reason to keep.

Finding F32 (ranked review #1): runie-core (51,524 LOC, 30+ deps) mixes IO + domain + UI DSL; every binary transitively compiles redb/git2/notify/arboard/png/tiktoken/schemars/jsonschema. Split into runie-domain (pure) + runie-io (actor impls). finish-io-migration explicitly deferred this; it is the root-cause task that makes F35/F36/F37 straightforward. Highest-leverage move in the audit.

Finding F33 (ranked review #4): runie-tui/src/effects/ (339 LOC) executes IO directly in the rendering crate — share.rs uses reqwest (only reason TUI depends on reqwest), editor.rs uses tempfile, clipboard.rs/login.rs/suspend.rs do side effects. Move to IoActor messages emitting events. Body says distinct from collapse-effect-payload-indirection; treated here as a prerequisite (collapse the enum indirection first, then move the IO). Drops reqwest+tempfile from TUI non-dev deps.

Finding F34 (ranked review #2): runie-print (95 LOC) + runie-json (274 LOC) + runie-server (283 LOC) all do spawn_headless_runtime + run_headless_turn with only I/O framing varying. Supersedes extract-headless-cli-helper (which keeps 3 crates sharing a helper). Collapse into one runie-cli with print/json/server subcommands. Saves 2 manifests + 2 link steps + triplicated dep edges.

Finding F35 (ranked review #7): core carries TUI-only modules every binary compiles — ui/ (1040), dialog/ (~1300), login_flow/ (~1100), providers_dialog (~200), themes (43), markdown render helpers, ipc.rs (128). Move TUI-only into runie-tui; move ipc.rs into runie-cli server. Keep pure parts (markdown parsing) in domain. Cleanup pass after F32 crate split.

Finding F36 (ranked review #8): markdown (core 551 LOC parsing / tui 138 LOC render) + theme/themes (core 43 / tui 684) duplicate names across crates. diff/ui/ipc pairs already covered by merge-diff-modules, rename-core-ui-to-view, fold-protocol-into-core. This covers the markdown+theme remainder + adds a no-collision guardrail test.

Finding F37 (ranked review #10): seven config locations at core root (config.rs, config/ dir, config_migrate.rs, config_reload/ dir, login_config.rs, login_config/ dir, login_flow/ dir). After delete-config-reload-shim + remove-login-config-test-shim + gate-or-move-single-consumer-core-modules, consolidate remaining config.rs + config_migrate.rs into config/ dir. Mirrors group-session-modules-into-dir.

Finding F38 (ranked review #6 extras): thiserror (1 file, subagent.rs) -> anyhow or manual impl; async-trait (9+ files in runie-engine tool impls + agent sink) -> native async fn in traits (stable since Rust 1.75, edition 2021). Extends drop-small-stdlib-replaceable-deps. async-trait removal is the bigger win (proc-macro dep on every tool impl).

PermissionGate is byte-for-byte duplicated in runie-core/src/permissions/gate.rs and runie-agent/src/permission_gate.rs. Keep core version only and re-export from agent. Index status reverted from done to todo: file header says todo, code still contains the target artifact.
Test-count verification logic duplicated between .github/workflows/ci.yml (EXPECTED_TOTAL_TESTS=1806) and scripts/verify-tests.sh (EXPECTED_TOTAL=2271). Make script the single source of truth.
Seven MiniMax SSE fixture files are byte-identical in runie-agent and runie-provider test fixtures. Move to a single shared location.
Multiple overlapping Message/chat-message types in provider.rs, message/mod.rs, proto/messages.rs, and runie-protocol. Canonicalize on ChatMessage.
LLMEvent, AgentEvent, DurableCoreEvent, proto::EventMsg, and EffectCommand describe overlapping streaming lifecycles. Use one core Event with provider/durable views.
Tool-call concept represented by message::ToolCall, tool_runtime::ToolCall, tool_parser::ParsedToolCall, Part::ToolCall, provider ToolCallDelta, and accumulators. Define one canonical type.
Provider abstraction sandwich: Provider trait -> ProviderFactory -> DynProvider -> DynProviderFactory -> BuiltProvider -> retry wrapper. Collapse into one handle.
stream_response.rs and headless.rs duplicate ToolCallAccumulator and streaming state machines. Extract a shared StreamingToolParser parameterized by observer.
turn.rs execute_tools and headless.rs execute_headless_tools share permission gate, registry lookup, and result-message formatting. Route both through one helper.
Every tool in runie-engine/src/tool/*.rs hand-writes input_schema, name, is_read_only, and requires_approval. Introduce a declarative macro or builder.

ToolOutput struct literals repeated in every tool success/error/lock path. Add success/error/json_success/json_error constructors. Index status reverted from done to todo: file header says todo, code still contains the target artifact.
search/core.rs and find_definitions.rs duplicate FFF not-indexed/picker-not-initialized output builders and lock handling. Move to shared helpers.
ConfigReply<T> and ProviderReply<T> are identical Arc<Mutex<Option<oneshot::Sender<T>>>> wrappers. Introduce generic actor::Reply<T>.
Every actor repeats enum XxxMsg, struct XxxActorHandle { tx }, new, tx, and async request methods. Use generic ActorHandle<Msg> or #[actor] macro.
ApprovalDecision {Approve, Reject} in proto/op.rs and PermissionAction {Allow, Ask, Deny} in permissions/mod.rs overlap. Use PermissionAction as canonical.
serde, async-trait, base64, tempfile, and tokio feature sets are repeated inline across crate manifests. Promote to workspace deps.
checkout, rust-toolchain, and cache steps are copy-pasted across CI jobs. Extract a composite GitHub Action.
4-layer testing strategy and config example are duplicated across AGENTS.md, Architecture.md, UI_UX.md, and README.md. Link instead of duplicating.
config.schema.json mirrors defaults declared in config.rs. Generate from schemars and add CI check.
prompts.rs and turn_setup.rs both define build_system_prompt. Merge to one public entry point or rename the turn-setup helper.
SubmissionId is a u64 in proto/op.rs and a String alias in runie-testing/runner.rs. Rename the test alias.
ToolCallState and ToolStatus describe overlapping tool execution lifecycles. Merge or define a clear conversion.
ConfirmationKind/ConfirmationRouter classify tools separately from permission policies. Drive confirmation UI from permission result.
ProviderError, LLMError, ToolError, ToolParseError, SubagentError, proto::Error, and anyhow::Error overlap. Centralize or standardize on anyhow.
handle_history_prev and handle_history_next in update/input/mod.rs are mirror images. Extract a helper that returns the navigation action.
handle_scoped_model_enable_all and handle_scoped_model_disable_all differ only by true/false. Replace with set_scoped_models_enabled(enabled: bool).
ConfigActor save_provider/remove_provider/set_default_model/set_provider_models repeat spawn_blocking + load_and_emit. Extract mutate_config helper.
runie-json and runie-server duplicate --yolo parsing, warning, and AutoAllowSink/DenyAllSink construction. Extract build_sink helper.
runie-tui/src/theme/colors.rs has ~15 near-identical accessor functions. Generate with theme_color! macro.
state.messages_changed(); state.ensure_fresh(); appears 174 times across tests. Add AppState::refresh_after_message_change helper.
ensure_turn_complete_last() is called in 6 of 9 match arms in update/agent/mod.rs. Wrap dispatch so the invariant is enforced automatically.
runie-testing/Cargo.toml uses explicit path dependencies for internal crates instead of workspace = true.
cargo test/clippy/fmt commands are repeated in dev.sh, bacon.toml, README.md, and CI. Centralize in justfile recipes.
core/src/ui/elements.rs defines Element variants that mirror ChatMessage/Role/Part/ToolOutput/AgentEvent. Generate from model instead of maintaining parallel hierarchy.

Master tracking task for the 2026-06 architecture review. Tracking tasks are NOT in the dep graph — children are independent tasks each with their own priority. This task is done only when every per-finding fixup listed in its body lands (delete-dead-actor-reply-reexport, delete-dead-theme-async-loaders, delete-dead-tuple-actor-handles-fields, delete-dead-history-action-vimnav, fix-permission-gate-rename-in-testing, add-engine-tool-tests, consolidate-slash-command-handlers, tighten-build-lint-complexity-heuristic, unify-markdown-rendering, plus the P0 promotion of rename-core-ui-to-view).
actors/mod.rs:50 has `pub use self::Reply;` colliding with the local definition at line 27. Fails cargo test compile. Same class as delete-tui-ipc-reexport-shim and delete-config-reload-shim.
runie-tui/src/theme/loader.rs has 3 unused async fns flagged dead_code: load_theme_raw_async, load_theme_async, load_theme_with_caps_async. Wire into bootstrap or delete.
runie-tui/src/main.rs:96 ActorHandles tuple fields 0..4 are never read. Struct only kept alive to drop the actor tasks. Rename to _0.._4 or add allow(dead_code) with comment.
update/input/mod.rs:116 HistoryAction::VimNav(bool) is never constructed; navigate_history takes `dir: Direction` and never uses it. Wire dir into a Direction-carrying HistoryAction or delete both.
runie-testing/src/fixtures.rs:6 imports PermissionGate which was renamed to PermissionMode. Trivial cargo fix. Coordinate with unify-permission-gate (P0) which will consolidate back to one type.

runie-engine (2466 LOC built-in tools) ships zero tests. Add Layer 1 + Layer 2 coverage per tool: read_file, list_dir, write_file, edit_file, bash, grep, find, find_definitions, fetch_docs. Coordinate with introduce-tool-definition-macro.

RunXCommand dispatcher in update/command.rs duplicates flows that also exist in update/dialog/. Each slash command requires 3 places of code (registry, dispatcher, dialog form). Consolidate into one canonical handler per command.
build_lint.rs count_complexity excludes loop/break/continue/return. Nested match arms slip through (update/agent/mod.rs::dispatch is 41 lines). Add match-arm counter or arm-length cap.

Markdown split between runie-core/src/markdown/ (parsing) and runie-tui/src/markdown.rs (rendering). Core should only expose ParsedDoc; tui owns the Span rendering. Prerequisite for split-runie-core-into-domain-and-io-crates.

22 files in event/ for a 109-variant Event. Group per-domain sub-enums into 4 dirs (input/agent/io/dialog) or fold into variants.rs. File body references simplify-event-vocabulary / simplify-event-module-layout as superseded prior tasks; both have been archived and this task subsumes them. Orphaned from index by prior archive sweep.
11 login-flow files in 5 module roots (login_flow.rs + login_flow/ + login_config.rs + login_config/ + state/login_flow). Group into single login_flow/ dir.

runie-print (97 LOC) + runie-json (274) + runie-server (283) as separate workspace members. Fold print+json into runie-tui subcommands. consolidate-binary-setup (done) already moved shared setup into headless_runtime. Stale 'depends on consolidate-binary-setup' removed.

AppState holds LazyCache<Element> (view AST inside domain). Move cache to UiActor; domain exposes raw posts. Required before crate split (split-runie-core-into-domain-and-io-crates). Body explicitly notes it is distinct from rename-core-ui-to-view (both share fold-state-into-model-state but are otherwise independent). Original 'blocks: rename-core-ui-to-view' was a direction error and has been removed.
runie-engine (2234 LOC, 17 files, 1 consumer) adds no independence. Fold into runie-agent/src/tool/. Coordinate with add-engine-tool-tests for test placement.
Two diff.rs files: runie-core/src/diff.rs (domain) and runie-tui/src/diff.rs (466 LOC, render-flavored). Render tui/diff from canonical runie_core::diff::Diff type.
actor.rs (singular, 222 LOC) holds the trait; actors/ (plural) holds the impls. Grep-ambiguous. Fold trait into actors/trait.rs.
~840 LOC of provider knowledge (provider_registry.rs 435 + model_catalog.rs 405) belongs in runie-provider. Domain crate is the wrong home.
model/snapshot.rs (76 LOC) is not the UI Snapshot (in snapshot.rs). It does token accounting + compaction. Rename to model/compaction.rs.
git2 (vendored-libgit2) used in 6 files for branch/worktree/status. Replace with git CLI via IoActor/GitService. Drops C toolchain from build.

parking_lot (3 sites) -> std Mutex; palette (2 sites) -> std RGB math; serde_yaml (1 site) -> toml/hand parser. remove-unused-cargo-deps (done) covered the truly-unused case; this targets underused. Stale 'depends on remove-unused-cargo-deps' removed.
tasks/ has 127 .md files; only 113 active in index. Archive done/superseded tasks/ files; close stale todos; keep root to active work + TEMPLATE + index.json.
Three layouts coexist: inline mod tests (125), sibling *_tests.rs (29), tests/ dirs (9). Standardize on inline mod tests. Subsumes relocate-loose-tests-files.
